channel.title: cha0t1c on chtc
channel.description: Recent content in cha0t1c on chtc

item.title: home
item.description: I am chtc and I'm a dumbass from Poland. I like to listen to "normal" stuff and stuff that makes your ears bleed. I rarely play games and for some reason I want to CBT be done on me by the games. Go to other pages for more interesting stuff. <-- Webring's site --> Show played songs function lastfm() { document.
